ab: pinbaqi cu isu nanak.
Watan Silan lalu ma, mpux kawas mu mwani.
en: My name is Watan Silan, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: ima lalu su?
lalu mu ga Losing Moqu.
laqi na rok nunu qa isu?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: kingan ga laqi Tayal.
qutux cnmuyax cimu ga Genzyumin qabax?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: uya, cami qutux cnmuyax ga cquliq Tayal qabax.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是泰雅族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Atayal.

ab: qutux cnmuyax cimu ga Genzyumin qabax?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: iyat, yaba mu ga Tayal, kaht qa yaya mu hiya.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是泰雅族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Atayal, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: isu ga laqi na ima?
kingan ga laqi na Hayung Pasang.
qaca ga yaba su? pisa kawas nya la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: tiyu pgan kawas nya la.
qaca ga yaba su? pisa kawas nya la?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: iyat, hiya ga bnheci na qalang myan, spat pgan kawas nya la.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pisa kawas na qbsuyan su la?
mpux spat kawas qa qbsuyan mu la.
cpngan ga hnyasun nya pisa kawas isu qa qbsuyan su?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: kya magan kawas cnpngan hayi qa ini ptnaq kawas myan.
pisa kbawiq qa he su?
kingan ga qutux kbhul spat pgan kongbung.
mbsyaq ta ini pktayux, ini ga wan su mhlawax loyi?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: uya, qutux kbhul tiyul kongbung kingan la.
ini ga nyan su mqthoy la?
ini ay, mnuqu su ktayux la.
nyan su mhekang la?
ini ay, nyan cu mqthoy.
wan su mqthoy la ga?
uya, tiyul kongking kn’usux he mu.
